negotiating from the lower range). This has been aligned with Emily as well.

hands-on experience across the product lifecycle — from gathering user
requirements and writing user stories/technical specs to conducting

communication is clear and structured, and she demonstrates logical

alignment workshops and applying frameworks like Impact–Effort–User Value

practical solutions in case studies, and is motivated to grow from a BA to
a full product role where she can oversee end-to-end product refinement and
enhancement.
